author: gb9t
content: Iter 102 result: net/ipv4/inet-hashtables.md (per-protocol socket hashes - inet_hashtables.c ~1393 lines; per-AF InetHashinfo with lhash2 (per-port listener hash) + ehash (per-tuple established hash) + bhash (per-port bind hash) + bhash2 (per-(port, addr) for IPv6/VLAN) + per-bucket spinlock + RCU walk + SO_REUSEPORT reuseport-group + SO_BINDTODEVICE + per-namespace isolation + inet_ehash_secret per-boot random) + virt/kvm/x86-cet.md (CET shadow-stack + IBT - in x86.c ~150-200 lines; per-vCPU MSR_IA32_S_CET + U_CET + PL[0-3]_SSP per-privilege shadow-stack pointers + INT_SSP_TAB + XSAVE components 11+12 + CR4.CET enable + #CP exception (vector 21) on SHSTK-mismatch / IBT-violation / etc. + CPUID 0x07.0:ECX[7] SHSTK + EDX[20] IBT). 154 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/netlink/af_netlink.md (netlink socket family) + virt/kvm/x86-pat.md (PAT MSR virtualization).
